headline: Baker Hughes and H&P collaborate to advance US geothermal development
summary: Baker Hughes and Helmerich & Payne, Inc. have announced a strategic collaboration to support geothermal exploration and development in the US, including the contracting of a land drilling rig dedicated to geothermal activity.

headline: Analyst Trims Baker Hughes (BKR) Price Target by $5
summary: Baker Hughes Company (NASDAQ:BKR) is included among the 12 Best LNG Stocks to Buy in 2026.
